title: KandyToys Jurassic Era Large Soft Rubber Foam Dinosaur Figure 36cm Dinosaur Toys For Boys
features: The KandyToys 36cm Large Dinosaur Toys are sure to delight any young dinosaur enthusiast! The dinosaur range includes a T-Rex, Stegosaurus, Triceratops and a Velociraptor
These giant Dinosaurs toys are covered with a soft touch material, which is child friendly and allows for a more comfortable, fun playtime!
With their realistic details, high quality finish and durable BPA-free materials, kids will be able to enjoy hours of imaginative play recreating moments of the past
These dinosaurs make for a fantastic gift for any young budding dinosaur enthusiast and will only help develop their passion of the Jurassic world
4 Assorted designs to collect. One design sent at random, sizes slightly vary by design
description: Unleash the power of play with our 36cm Dinosaur Foam Toy – where creativity meets prehistoric fun! This foam companion takes playtime to a whole new level, offering endless possibilities for imaginative exploration. There are 4 Assorted Styles to collect in which One will be sent at random. These impressive large-size dinosaurs have been designed in museum colours to excite any dinosaur fan. The awesome detailing and realistic colouring combined with the soft slightly squashable foam produces an overall fantastic toy for children. Safety is paramount, and our foam toy is designed with your child in mind. The soft, foam construction ensures worry-free play, making it suitable for indoor adventures and safe for those epic dinosaur battles. Suitable for ages 3+
